The '''KE-8 Enforcer Ship''' was a floating patrol vehicle utilized by the [[Kaminoan]] [[Cloning|cloners]] of [[Tipoca City]] to identify and isolate aberrant [[clone trooper]]s during the development and training of the [[Grand Army of the Republic]].

==Characteristics==
A hovering, single-occupant pod, the KE-8 Enforcer Ship was a small and sleek vessel that saw use as a patrol vehicle. It was fitted with powerful manipulator arms and [[electroshock stun device]]s, located beneath the [[pilot]]. Two jets on either side of the [[cockpit]] propelled the Enforcer Ship through the air.<ref name="SWCL" />

==Role==
KE-8 Enforcer Ships were deployed in the interior of the [[Tipoca City Military Complex|clone military education complex]] in [[Tipoca City]], operating alongside larger [[Observation Ship]]s and autonomous [[KE-8 Enforcer Ship|enforcer drone]]s, to ensure quality control in the [[Kaminoan]] [[cloning]] process. Enforcer Ships patrolled the complex to identify and isolate aberrant [[Clone trooper|clones]], while those who displayed exceptional abilities were sent to receive specialized military education elsewhere. The KE-8s docked on the rings of deployment and recharge stations, accessed via an ingress/egress hatch, which were overseen by senior Kaminoan security officials from a command bridge. The vessels' activity and communications with Observation Ships were tracked via computer terminals and monitoring stations.<ref name="SWCL" />

Similar vessels, lacking the KE-8's manipulator arms and electroshock devices, were used as repair and maintenance [[droid]]s on the military complex's maintenance floor.<ref name="SWCL" />

==History==
KE-8 Enforcer Ships were in use as of [[Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi]]'s visit to [[Tipoca City]] in [[22 BBY]]. The vehicles carried out their patrols while [[Prime Minister]] [[Lama Su]] and his [[aide]] [[Taun We]] led Kenobi on a tour of the [[Tipoca City Military Complex]].<ref name="AOTC">{{Film|II}}</ref>
